attributes.function: Public content delivery (TLS 1.2+, OAC to origin)
attributes.diagram_label: CloudFront distribution
attributes.baseline_configuration: AWS CloudFront default + custom security headers policy

attributes.function: Origin storage for static site content and /.well-known/ artifacts
attributes.diagram_label: S3 origin bucket
attributes.baseline_configuration: AWS S3 default + bucket policy enforcing OAC + public access block

attributes.function: Daily runtime KSI emitter; revalidates live AWS configuration
attributes.diagram_label: Lambda — runtime KSI emitter
attributes.baseline_configuration: AWS Lambda default + IAM scope (read 3 S3 config APIs, 1 CF distribution; write 1 S3 key)

disclosure.remarks: This system is not FedRAMP-authorized. The artifacts published at /.well-known/ are self-attested by the operator and demonstrate an architectural pattern aligned with FedRAMP NTC-0009 (machine-readable authorization data, text-based equivalents, the five Balance Improvement Releases folding into default requirements). See https://samaydlette.com/research/the-plumbing.html for context and limitations.
